SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2009 - CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE; MONICA RILEY, CLERK; MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO: DEFT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ESTACIO, RAENAN AS TO DEFENDANT NGUY, THANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2010 - CONTINUED TO FEB-24-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO RETURN WITH CHINESE INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTACIO, RAENAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUY, THANG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,155.00, THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES FOR PLAINTIFF'S TRAUMA, PAIN AND SUFFERING. HOWEVER, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S EXTENSIVE CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT WAS NECESSITATED BY THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
